registryMode.description: Metric and algorithm configuration is driven by registry metadata and per-metric parameter resolution.

workflow.title: Select Files
workflow.description: Upload actigraphy and optional supporting files.

workflow.title: Preview Full Recording
workflow.description: Inspect the full recording before cleaning and analysis.

workflow.title: Cleaning & Masking
workflow.description: Optionally apply masking and recording-bound cleaning.

workflow.title: Sleep Diary / Logs
workflow.description: Attach sleep diary or start-stop-time files when available.

workflow.title: Choose Metrics & Algorithms
workflow.description: Select metrics, rest-detection algorithms, and parameter settings.

workflow.title: Generate Results
workflow.description: Create summaries, overlays, and analysis outputs.

workflow.title: Export Outputs
workflow.description: Save tables, overlays, and report-ready outputs.

uiText.maskingHelp: Masking is used to exclude spurious inactivity or non-wear periods, such as times when the watch was removed.
uiText.diaryHelp: Sleep diary overlays should show nocturnal sleep and naps distinctly. Provide diary-format help directly in the upload area.
uiText.sstHelp: Start/Stop Time files define the effective recording interval (i.e., when watch was actually worn by participant, instead of for demonstration purposes, etc.) and is optional.
uiText.algorithmHelp: All scoring algorithms return a binary rest/activity time series and can be previewed as overlays.
